mapper.sql: id, creator_id, author_name, forum_name, title, summary, content, reply_count, like_count, favorite_count, status, created_at, updated_at
mapper.update: update `community_post` set like_count = like_count + 1, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
update `community_post` set like_count = case when like_count > 0 then like_count - 1 else 0 end, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
update `community_post` set favorite_count = favorite_count + 1, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
update `community_post` set favorite_count = case when favorite_count > 0 then favorite_count - 1 else 0 end, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
update `community_post` set reply_count = #{replyCount}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
update `community_post` set status = #{status}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
